calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Julie Tang, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Jacqueline Chan, #10276.

David J. Williams, Esq. appeared for plaintiff FB Holdings, LLC, a Missouri limited liability company.
No appearance by defendant Scott Salazar Myers.
Defaults were entered against defendant on August 7, 2009 & September 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 17, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 23, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, adn good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff FB Holdings, LLC, a Missouri limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Scott Salazar Myers as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,323,844.59.
Prejudgment Interest - $128,824.84.
Attorney's Fees - $9,325.00.
Costs - $520.75 for a total judgment in the amount of $5,462,515.18.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
